description: Black backpack with one main two way zipped compartment with one smaller zipped compartment on the front One small zipped pocket on the front with a twill tape design that has a velcro closure on the top and the bottom of the bagTwo mesh bottle holders on the sidesOne haul loop for carrying easeTwo adjustable and padded shoulder straps with a click clasp to hold both straps together for enhanced comfortBranding appliquéd on the front
